blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Told you! What I say? Dead serious.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh I thought you was right behind me.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: What? Nah I was right there. Deadass.
Ms. Barrett did alphabetical. Jenkins behind Michaels. Two rows. Same as always.

blocks.speaker: Ms. Barrett
blocks.content: Before we get into anything — quick intros. Name and one thing about yourself. One thing. Jonathan, let's start with you.
The whole room shifted. I felt it from two rows back.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Does he actually know everyone already?
